data.title: Soros Fund Management LLC Reduces Stake in Alphabet Inc.
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Soros Fund Mangment LLC, managed by George Soros, recently executed a significant transaction involving Alphabet Inc. Class A ((GOOGL)). The hedge fund reduced its position by 813,491 shares.

Recent Updates on Alphabet Inc. Class A stock

Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) reported strong Q4 2024 financial results, with a 14% increase in annual revenue to $350 billion, driven by advancements in AI and a 30% rise in Google Cloud revenue. Despite a 4% decline in network advertising revenue, the company saw a 31% rise in operating income and 28% growth in net income. Alphabet plans to invest $75 billion in capital expenditures for AI and infrastructure, anticipating potential revenue challenges in 2025 due to currency fluctuations and the leap year effect. The stock’s year-to-date performance shows a slight decline of around 2-3%, with a market cap of approximately $2,282.6 billion. Hedge fund interest in Alphabet has been mixed, with some funds increasing their positions and others reducing them.

More about Alphabet Inc. Class A

YTD Price Performance: -2.22%

Average Trading Volume: 28,719,287

Current Market Cap: $2278.6B

data.description:

  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Clough Capital Partners L P, managed by Charles Clough, recently executed a significant transaction involving Broadcom Inc. ((AVGO)). The hedge fund reduced its position by 21,708 shares.

Recent Updates on Broadcom Inc. stock

Recent updates on Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) include the company’s launches of the Emulex Secure Fibre Channel Host Bus Adapters and the Brocade G710 24-port 64G switch, focusing on enhancing data encryption and Fibre Channel technology. Despite these innovations, Morgan Stanley reduced its price target for Broadcom to $246 citing concerns about AI developments like DeepSeek, whereas Barclays raised its target to $260, showing optimism for Broadcom’s AI and semiconductor prospects. Bullish options activity, with increased call trading and implied volatility, indicates market optimism ahead of Broadcom’s earnings on March 6th. Broadcom’s year-to-date price performance is around 1.32%, with a market cap approximately ranging from $1101.7 billion to $1107.9 billion.

data.title: Moore Capital Management LP Reduces Stake in Alphabet Inc.
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Moore Capital Management LP, managed by Louis Moore Bacon, recently executed a significant transaction involving Alphabet Inc. Class C ((GOOG)). The hedge fund reduced its position by 27,698 shares.

Recent Updates on Alphabet Inc. Class C stock

Recent developments for Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) include strong Q4 2024 financial results, with a 12% year-over-year increase in consolidated revenues to $96.5 billion. This growth was mainly driven by a 10% rise in Google Services revenue and a 30% surge in Google Cloud revenue, largely due to advancements in AI infrastructure. Operating and net incomes increased by 31% and 28%, respectively, with earnings per share rising to $2.15. Despite a slight year-to-date price performance decline of around 1.87%, the stock has seen increased confidence from several hedge funds, such as Baupost Group LLC, Egerton Capital, and others, which have significantly increased their positions. CEO Sundar Pichai emphasized the company’s focus on AI leadership and announced plans for substantial capital expenditures to enhance technological capabilities. Alphabet’s market cap remains robust at approximately $2278.6 billion.

More about Alphabet Inc. Class C

data.description:

Gaon ( ($IL:GAON.M) ) has shared an announcement.

Gaon Holdings-S, a corporation listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange, reported a change in its securities holdings. The report detailed that Moshe Misgav, a senior office holder, sold 40,000 bonds (Series D) in a single transaction, leading to a decrease in his holdings from 0.25% to 0% of the total securities of that type. The transaction was completed on February 5, 2025, at a rate of 101.80 Ag. This change reflects a reduction in Misgav’s influence over the company’s capital and voting power, which now stands at 0.16%. The sale was reported promptly to the relevant authorities, with the corporation becoming aware of the transaction on February 14, 2025.

data.title: Newmed Energy Secures Approval for Updated Aphrodite Reservoir Development Plan
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest announcement is out from Newmed Energ Pu ( (IL:NWMD) ).

Newmed Energy has received approval for an updated development plan for the Aphrodite reservoir in Cyprus, which includes the implementation of Front-End Engineering Design (FEED) and Pre-FEED, with a final investment decision projected for 2027. The project aims to begin production by 2031 with a maximum capacity of 800 MMCF per day, while ensuring high environmental and safety standards, with project partners Chevron Cyprus Limited and BG Cyprus Limited holding significant stakes.

More about Newmed Energ Pu

Newmed Energy is a company involved in the energy sector, focusing on the development and production of natural resources. The company engages in projects like the Aphrodite reservoir in Cyprus, aiming to enhance its market position through strategic partnerships and advanced engineering designs.
